recommended.description: Tax reporting and capital gains calculation
Position sizing, VaR, stress testing, and portfolio risk metrics
AI-powered news analysis, sentiment scoring, and event impact
Strategy backtesting with performance metrics and Monte Carlo simulation
On-chain valuation, DeFi yields, whale tracking, and token unlocks
Economic calendar, macro regime classification, and event impact analysis
One-person quant fund management — capital allocation, leaderboard, risk control
Strategy research lab — regime analysis, candidate design, Walk-Forward validation
Strategy evolution — promotion, demotion, mutation, fitness-based culling
Trade review and learning — error book, success patterns, experience insights

note: These skills require findoo-trader-plugin + findoo-datahub-plugin extensions. Legacy fin-market-data/fin-portfolio/fin-trading skills have been replaced.
